title: Steven Universe Era 3
description: With the lack of Steven Universe mods and the rise of the show I decided to make this for all fans to enjoy!
body:
I made this mod because I'm a big Steven universe fan, this adds custom minerals like Pearl or Peridot and makes exsisting minerals in the game like Lapis or Amethyst have powers! You need a gem convertor to make them have their powers, Gem Convertor crafting recipe below!
![Gem Convertor Crafting Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0e1575d5573379cd03a11ad5979bee3d4941954.png)

# MAKING GEMS:
## VERSIONS 6.0+
You will get the recipes after you make the gem converter and an advancement. Once you go into the crafting table and check your recipe book you will see all the recipes for each gem, they are very different so you might have to do a little bit of grinding and exploring.
## OLDER VERSIONS
There are also fusions, they automatically have their powers when crafted! Crafting recipes work like this, Gem + Gem convertor + Gem = Gemified Gem, or for fusions Gem block 1 + Gem convertor + Gem block 2 = Fusion, Fusion example, Sapphire Block + Gem Convertor + Ruby Block = Garnet. Image below!
![Crafting Gemified Gems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17a379271f7160e4d5f7917754094efae2438be1.png)
